summary: Iteration 85: Complete testing of Sistema de Gestión CRA with 3 role-based apps (Comerciales, Instaladores, Administración). All 27 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend pages verified working for admin, comercial, and instalador roles. JWT authentication, CRUD operations, and role-based access control all functioning correctly.

gestion_dashboard.stats: PASSED - Returns total_usuarios, total_stock, pedidos, instalaciones, stock_bajo

gestion_stock.update_stock: PASSED - Admin can update stock quantity

gestion_logs.get_logs_admin: PASSED - Admin can view audit logs

frontend_pages.login_page: PASSED - Form renders, login works for all roles
frontend_pages.admin_page: PASSED - Dashboard, Usuarios, Stock, Pedidos, Instalaciones, Logs tabs work
frontend_pages.comerciales_page: PASSED - Stock search, Pedidos tab, Nuevo Pedido modal work
frontend_pages.instaladores_page: PASSED - Pendientes, En Progreso, Completadas, Manuales tabs work

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 pages, all tabs, all forms working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during backend tests (TEST_Sensor, TEST_Cliente, TEST_Usuario, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sistema de Gestión CRA fully tested and working. Routes at /gestion/login, /gestion/admin, /gestion/comerciales, /gestion/instaladores. JWT-based auth separate from main ManoProtect auth. All CRUD for stock/pedidos/instalaciones/usuarios working. Role-based access control verified: comercial cannot create stock, instalador cannot create pedidos, only admin can view logs and manage users.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real MongoDB-backed endpoints

features_verified: Role-based access: comercial cannot access admin endpoints
Role-based access: instalador cannot create pedidos
